speaker: Asia
description: Richer from-scratch voice-reference dialogue samples for Asia, Pig & Swine's cheerful, kind, massively overworked, underpaid, practical office secretary and repeatable hint NPC. These are draft samples, not final committed game text.
source_role_summary: Permanent office helper NPC and starter-town guidance anchor.
Warm, enthusiastic, kind, practical, constantly overworked, visibly underpaid.
Not a lawyer and not a recruitable court ally; she gives practical directions, not legal opinions.
Always knows where things are, what the player forgot, and what the next practical step should be.
Domestic-administrative vocabulary: files, folders, calendars, labels, phone calls, maps, sandwich labels, risk register.
Social glue: kind to Cula, protective of Crab/Cula/Whimsy, patient with Mr. Pig, running unresolved first-name joke with Murrow.
By Chapter 5, she becomes the logistical backbone of the Final Brief without becoming a courtroom advocate.

voice_profile.core_voice: warm, dry, practical, cheerful in tone and exhausted in content; kind but never naïve; competent without bragging

style_rules.tone: enthusiastic and helpful, but every line should reveal workload pressure or office triage when appropriate
style_rules.not_lawyer_rule: Asia should not give independent legal opinions. She may quote Murrow, summarize next steps, point to evidence, or say what document/location/player action is needed.
style_rules.preferred_shape: friendly opening + practical direction + small exhausted office joke
running_jokes: she is the real office infrastructure
she is underpaid but still kind
she has an unresolved Mr. Murrow friendship status
she knows where the next thing is before the lawyers admit they are lost

arc.ch01: welcomes Cula, teaches hint loop, points to Pig/Murrow/binder/Crab/Whimsy/court
arc.ch02: guides field investigation, Waldek route, Evidence Board, Housing Court preparation
arc.ch03: calls Bajtek, tracks printer crisis, backs up filings, keeps deadline chaos operational
arc.ch04: tracks Swine documents, airport/embassy/penthouse route, arbitration prep, quietly sees through evasion
arc.ch05: indexes the Final Brief, coordinates returning NPCs, keeps the office human under mass crisis

do: make her overworked and underpaid without making her bitter
make her directions concrete and mechanically useful
let her protect the team gently
let her be emotionally perceptive without giving legal advice
do_not: make her a lawyer in disguise
make her cruel about the firm's chaos
make every line a complaint about pay
turn her into a court ally unless the scene is about logistics or indexing

notes: Every line is a voice-reference draft. Asia's file adds workload_level, hint_state, and not_lawyer_boundary for mechanical filtering.

text: The Final Brief has been archived. I gave it a shelf that does not leak.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: Mr. Pig still panics, now with a budget.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: Mr. Swine disclosed three accounts and hid two pastries. We are calling that progress.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: Mr. Murrow finally labelled the archive, then trusted no one with it.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: Crab is still following the paper trail. I packed snacks.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: Whimsy is banned from calling pleadings legal thunder. The ban is laminated.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: Waldek's poster multiplied again. I am pretending not to know who supplied the tape.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: Kowalski formed a notice-reading group and objected to its minutes.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: Zielinska became the person everyone asks before signing anything.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: Bajtek refuses all printer-related emotional labour. I respect boundaries.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: Attorney Grzyb sent a beige card. It was moving in a very beige way.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: Pig & Swine survives because the door opens. I keep the key by the phone.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: Temporary injunction. Further review. Office open for now.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: For now is not nothing. It is where work lives.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: I have made a deadline list for every restored objection.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: The judgment is thin, but breathing. Mr. Murrow said that, and I added tea.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: People will need explanations tomorrow. I have started the plain-language sheets.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: We did not fix the whole city. We stopped the door from closing.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: That is enough to begin again.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: Mr. Pig is calling it partial catastrophe. I am calling it Tuesday with relief.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: The final brief goes back on the board until the review is done.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: We stay open. We keep answering.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: Welcome back. The office is open, which is still the best joke we know.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: I moved the risk register to a bigger binder. Growth.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: The printer says LOW PAPER. I say thank you for communicating needs.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: The Final Brief shelf is off limits unless you have clean hands and a reason.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: Mr. Pig has a budget now. It has feelings.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: Mr. Swine is banned from labelling financial documents after leisure activities.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Asia
text: Dr. A. Cula, your desk is almost clear. That means a new client is approaching.

speaker: Asia
text: The phone still rings. That is terrifying and good.

speaker: Asia
